title: Space Dandy
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2 (13) = 26. Manga complete at 16 chapters / 2 volumes (Masafumi Harada/BONES, Young Gangan, 2013-2014), covering both TV seasons. Episodic/anthology anime with self-contained, often-reset episodes; the manga retells select episodes rather than adapting all 26 1:1 (e.g. chapter 1 diverges noticeably from anime episode 1), so the chapter split below is an approximate, roughly even distribution across the two seasons rather than a strict scene-for-scene correspondence.
